prompt: Inspect FusionKit provider metadata and summarize which record fields are needed to reproduce benchmark cost and capability context. Do not include implementation code or a patch solution.
expected_evidence: Identifies provider, endpoint, model, capability, pricing, and cost metadata fields.
Explains how metadata joins benchmark rows without exposing secrets.
contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen task derived from public repository structure; contains no customer data and no answer or patch solution.
